summary: Manage the notification topics: add and remove subscriptions, set display names, tune delivery retries, tag, apply access-policy templates, and delete a topic.

operations.title: Add a subscription to a topic
operations.summary: Add a new subscriber (email, SMS, queue, or function) to a topic; some endpoint types must confirm before delivery starts.
operations.description: Subscribes a new endpoint (email, SMS, SQS queue or Lambda) to an existing topic; email/SMS/HTTP endpoints must confirm the subscription before delivery starts.

params.name: topic
params.label: Topic
params.help: The topic the new endpoint will receive notifications from.

params.name: protocol
params.label: Protocol
params.help: Delivery protocol for the new subscriber.

params.name: endpoint
params.label: Endpoint

bounds.semantic: email address, E.164 phone number, SQS queue ARN, Lambda ARN, or HTTPS URL matching the chosen protocol

params.help: Destination address, e.g. an ops mailbox, phone number, or queue/function ARN.

params.name: filter_policy
params.label: Filter policy (JSON)

bounds.semantic: valid SNS message-attribute filter policy JSON, or empty for no filtering

params.help: Optional message filter so this subscriber only receives a subset of messages.

operations.title: Remove a topic subscription
operations.summary: Unsubscribe an endpoint from a topic. It stops receiving notifications right away and must reconfirm if added back later.
operations.description: Unsubscribes an endpoint from a topic; that endpoint stops receiving notifications immediately and would need to re-confirm if re-added later.

params.name: subscription
params.label: Subscription
params.help: The subscription (topic + endpoint pair) to remove.

operations.title: Set topic display name
operations.summary: Change the topic's display name, used as the SMS sender prefix and the email From label. No delivery interruption.
operations.description: Changes the topic's display_name, used as the SMS sender ID prefix and the From label on email-based subscriptions; no delivery interruption.

params.name: topic
params.label: Topic
params.help: The topic to rename for display purposes.

params.name: new_display_name
params.label: New display name
params.help: Up to 100 characters; SMS sender ID is truncated to 10 characters by carriers.

operations.title: Retune HTTP/S delivery retry policy
operations.summary: Tune how many times and how long SNS retries delivery to HTTP or HTTPS subscribers before giving up.
operations.description: Adjusts the topic's delivery_policy retry backoff for HTTP/S subscribers (max retries and max delay between attempts) before SNS gives up and reports the message as undeliverable.

params.name: topic
params.label: Topic
params.help: The topic whose HTTP/S retry behaviour to change.

params.name: new_delivery_policy_num_retries
params.label: Max retries
params.help: Total delivery attempts to an HTTP/S endpoint before giving up.

params.name: new_delivery_policy_max_delay_target
params.label: Max retry delay (seconds)
params.help: Longest backoff delay between retry attempts.

operations.title: Update topic tags
operations.summary: Add or update the topic's tags; only the tags you list change and others are left alone. Metadata only, no effect on delivery.
operations.description: Sets or merges cost-allocation and ownership tags on a topic; purely metadata, no effect on delivery or subscribers.

params.name: topic
params.label: Topic
params.help: The topic to tag.

params.name: new_tags
params.label: Tags

bounds.semantic: key/value pairs, e.g. CostCentre, Environment, Owner

params.help: Full tag map to apply; existing tags not listed here are removed.

operations.title: Apply an access-policy template to a topic
operations.summary: Apply a pre-approved template controlling who can publish or subscribe to this topic, including cross-account access. Engineer-only.
operations.description: Replaces the topic's resource policy with a pre-approved named template (e.g. account-internal publish-only, or cross-account ERP read access); changes who/what can publish or subscribe.

params.name: topic
params.label: Topic
params.help: The topic whose access policy to change.

params.name: policy_template
params.label: Policy template
params.help: Named, pre-reviewed policy document; raw policy JSON is not accepted here.

operations.title: Delete a topic
operations.summary: Permanently delete the topic and all its subscriptions; publishers pointing at it start failing. Can't be undone; engineer-only.
operations.description: Permanently deletes the topic and every subscription attached to it; any publisher or CloudWatch alarm still pointing at it starts failing with NotFound, and history/metrics for the topic are lost.

params.name: topic
params.label: Topic
params.help: The topic to permanently delete.

operations.title: Set application (mobile push) success feedback IAM role
operations.summary: Set the IAM role SNS uses to log successful mobile push deliveries to CloudWatch. Logging only, no effect on delivery.
operations.description: Sets application_success_feedback_role_arn, the IAM role SNS assumes to write success-delivery feedback logs for mobile-app (application) endpoints to CloudWatch Logs. Observability only; no effect on message delivery.

params.name: topic
params.label: Topic
params.help: The topic whose mobile-app success-feedback logging role to set.

params.name: application_success_feedback_role_arn
params.label: Application success feedback IAM role ARN
params.help: ARN of an IAM role that grants SNS permission to write mobile-app success-feedback logs to CloudWatch Logs.

operations.title: Set application (mobile push) failure feedback IAM role
operations.summary: Set the IAM role SNS uses to log failed mobile push deliveries to CloudWatch. Logging only, no effect on delivery.
operations.description: Sets application_failure_feedback_role_arn, the IAM role SNS assumes to write failed-delivery feedback logs for mobile-app (application) endpoints to CloudWatch Logs. Observability only; no effect on message delivery.

params.name: topic
params.label: Topic
params.help: The topic whose mobile-app failure-feedback logging role to set.

params.name: application_failure_feedback_role_arn
params.label: Application failure feedback IAM role ARN
params.help: ARN of an IAM role that grants SNS permission to write mobile-app failure-feedback logs to CloudWatch Logs.

operations.title: Set application (mobile push) success feedback sample rate
operations.summary: Set what percentage of successful mobile push deliveries SNS logs to CloudWatch. Logging only, no effect on delivery.
operations.description: Sets application_success_feedback_sample_rate, the percentage (0-100) of successful mobile-app (application) deliveries SNS samples into CloudWatch success-feedback logs. Observability only; no effect on message delivery.

params.name: topic
params.label: Topic
params.help: The topic whose mobile-app success-feedback sample rate to set.

params.name: application_success_feedback_sample_rate
params.label: Application success feedback sample rate (%)
params.help: Percentage of successful deliveries to sample into CloudWatch logs, 0-100.

operations.title: Set HTTP/S success feedback IAM role
operations.summary: Set the IAM role SNS uses to log successful HTTP or HTTPS deliveries to CloudWatch. Logging only, no effect on delivery.
operations.description: Sets http_success_feedback_role_arn, the IAM role SNS assumes to write success-delivery feedback logs for HTTP/S endpoints to CloudWatch Logs. Observability only; no effect on message delivery.

params.name: topic
params.label: Topic
params.help: The topic whose HTTP/S success-feedback logging role to set.

params.name: http_success_feedback_role_arn
params.label: HTTP/S success feedback IAM role ARN
params.help: ARN of an IAM role that grants SNS permission to write HTTP/S success-feedback logs to CloudWatch Logs.

operations.title: Set HTTP/S failure feedback IAM role
operations.summary: Set the IAM role SNS uses to log failed HTTP or HTTPS deliveries to CloudWatch. Logging only, no effect on delivery.
operations.description: Sets http_failure_feedback_role_arn, the IAM role SNS assumes to write failed-delivery feedback logs for HTTP/S endpoints to CloudWatch Logs. Observability only; no effect on message delivery.

params.name: topic
params.label: Topic
params.help: The topic whose HTTP/S failure-feedback logging role to set.

params.name: http_failure_feedback_role_arn
params.label: HTTP/S failure feedback IAM role ARN
params.help: ARN of an IAM role that grants SNS permission to write HTTP/S failure-feedback logs to CloudWatch Logs.

operations.title: Set HTTP/S success feedback sample rate
operations.summary: Set what percentage of successful HTTP or HTTPS deliveries SNS logs to CloudWatch. Logging only, no effect on delivery.
operations.description: Sets http_success_feedback_sample_rate, the percentage (0-100) of successful HTTP/S deliveries SNS samples into CloudWatch success-feedback logs. Observability only; no effect on message delivery.

params.name: topic
params.label: Topic
params.help: The topic whose HTTP/S success-feedback sample rate to set.

params.name: http_success_feedback_sample_rate
params.label: HTTP/S success feedback sample rate (%)
params.help: Percentage of successful deliveries to sample into CloudWatch logs, 0-100.

operations.title: Set Lambda success feedback IAM role
operations.summary: Set the IAM role SNS uses to log successful Lambda deliveries to CloudWatch. Logging only, no effect on delivery.
operations.description: Sets lambda_success_feedback_role_arn, the IAM role SNS assumes to write success-delivery feedback logs for Lambda endpoints to CloudWatch Logs. Observability only; no effect on message delivery.

params.name: topic
params.label: Topic
params.help: The topic whose Lambda success-feedback logging role to set.

params.name: lambda_success_feedback_role_arn
params.label: Lambda success feedback IAM role ARN
params.help: ARN of an IAM role that grants SNS permission to write Lambda success-feedback logs to CloudWatch Logs.

operations.title: Set Lambda success feedback sample rate
operations.summary: Set what percentage of successful Lambda deliveries SNS logs to CloudWatch. Logging only, no effect on delivery.
operations.description: Sets lambda_success_feedback_sample_rate, the percentage (0-100) of successful Lambda deliveries SNS samples into CloudWatch success-feedback logs. Observability only; no effect on message delivery.

params.name: topic
params.label: Topic
params.help: The topic whose Lambda success-feedback sample rate to set.

params.name: lambda_success_feedback_sample_rate
params.label: Lambda success feedback sample rate (%)
params.help: Percentage of successful deliveries to sample into CloudWatch logs, 0-100.

operations.title: Set SQS success feedback IAM role
operations.summary: Set the IAM role SNS uses to log successful queue deliveries to CloudWatch. Logging only, no effect on delivery.
operations.description: Sets sqs_success_feedback_role_arn, the IAM role SNS assumes to write success-delivery feedback logs for SQS endpoints to CloudWatch Logs. Observability only; no effect on message delivery.

params.name: topic
params.label: Topic
params.help: The topic whose SQS success-feedback logging role to set.

params.name: sqs_success_feedback_role_arn
params.label: SQS success feedback IAM role ARN
params.help: ARN of an IAM role that grants SNS permission to write SQS success-feedback logs to CloudWatch Logs.

operations.title: Set SQS failure feedback IAM role
operations.summary: Set the IAM role SNS uses to log failed queue deliveries to CloudWatch. Logging only, no effect on delivery.
operations.description: Sets sqs_failure_feedback_role_arn, the IAM role SNS assumes to write failed-delivery feedback logs for SQS endpoints to CloudWatch Logs. Observability only; no effect on message delivery.

params.name: topic
params.label: Topic
params.help: The topic whose SQS failure-feedback logging role to set.

params.name: sqs_failure_feedback_role_arn
params.label: SQS failure feedback IAM role ARN
params.help: ARN of an IAM role that grants SNS permission to write SQS failure-feedback logs to CloudWatch Logs.

operations.title: Set SQS success feedback sample rate
operations.summary: Set what percentage of successful queue deliveries SNS logs to CloudWatch. Logging only, no effect on delivery.
operations.description: Sets sqs_success_feedback_sample_rate, the percentage (0-100) of successful SQS deliveries SNS samples into CloudWatch success-feedback logs. Observability only; no effect on message delivery.

params.name: topic
params.label: Topic
params.help: The topic whose SQS success-feedback sample rate to set.

params.name: sqs_success_feedback_sample_rate
params.label: SQS success feedback sample rate (%)
params.help: Percentage of successful deliveries to sample into CloudWatch logs, 0-100.

operations.title: Set Firehose success feedback IAM role
operations.summary: Set the IAM role SNS uses to log successful Kinesis Data Firehose deliveries to CloudWatch. Logging only, no effect on delivery.
operations.description: Sets firehose_success_feedback_role_arn, the IAM role SNS assumes to write success-delivery feedback logs for Kinesis Data Firehose endpoints to CloudWatch Logs. Observability only; no effect on message delivery.

params.name: topic
params.label: Topic
params.help: The topic whose Firehose success-feedback logging role to set.

params.name: firehose_success_feedback_role_arn
params.label: Firehose success feedback IAM role ARN
params.help: ARN of an IAM role that grants SNS permission to write Firehose success-feedback logs to CloudWatch Logs.

operations.title: Set Firehose failure feedback IAM role
operations.summary: Set the IAM role SNS uses to log failed Kinesis Data Firehose deliveries to CloudWatch. Logging only, no effect on delivery.
operations.description: Sets firehose_failure_feedback_role_arn, the IAM role SNS assumes to write failed-delivery feedback logs for Kinesis Data Firehose endpoints to CloudWatch Logs. Observability only; no effect on message delivery.

params.name: topic
params.label: Topic
params.help: The topic whose Firehose failure-feedback logging role to set.

params.name: firehose_failure_feedback_role_arn
params.label: Firehose failure feedback IAM role ARN
params.help: ARN of an IAM role that grants SNS permission to write Firehose failure-feedback logs to CloudWatch Logs.

operations.title: Set Firehose success feedback sample rate
operations.summary: Set what percentage of successful Kinesis Data Firehose deliveries SNS logs to CloudWatch. Logging only, no effect on delivery.
operations.description: Sets firehose_success_feedback_sample_rate, the percentage (0-100) of successful Kinesis Data Firehose deliveries SNS samples into CloudWatch success-feedback logs. Observability only; no effect on message delivery.

params.name: topic
params.label: Topic
params.help: The topic whose Firehose success-feedback sample rate to set.

params.name: firehose_success_feedback_sample_rate
params.label: Firehose success feedback sample rate (%)
params.help: Percentage of successful deliveries to sample into CloudWatch logs, 0-100.

operations.title: Set FIFO throughput scope
operations.summary: Choose whether a high-throughput FIFO topic orders and deduplicates messages topic-wide or per message group. Guardrailed change.
operations.description: Sets fifo_throughput_scope on a high-throughput FIFO topic, selecting the deduplication/ordering scope: Topic (topic-wide) or MessageGroup (per message group). Changes the ordering and deduplication guarantees downstream consumers rely on.

params.name: topic
params.label: Topic
params.help: The FIFO topic whose throughput/deduplication scope to change.

params.name: fifo_throughput_scope
params.label: FIFO throughput scope
params.help: Deduplication and ordering scope for a high-throughput FIFO topic.

operations.title: Toggle FIFO content-based deduplication
operations.summary: Toggle same-content deduplication on a FIFO topic. Enabling can silently merge duplicates; disabling can break dependent publishers.
operations.description: Sets content_based_deduplication (true/false) on a FIFO topic. When enabled, SNS derives the deduplication ID from a hash of the message body. Disabling can cause publish failures for producers that rely on it; enabling can silently deduplicate distinct same-body messages within the deduplication interval.

params.name: topic
params.label: Topic
params.help: The FIFO topic whose content-based deduplication setting to change.

params.name: content_based_deduplication
params.label: Content-based deduplication
params.help: Whether to enable content-based deduplication on this FIFO topic.

operations.title: Set subscription endpoint auto-confirm flag
operations.summary: Tell Terraform whether this subscriber's endpoint auto-confirms itself, like PagerDuty. No effect on an already-confirmed subscription.
operations.description: Sets this subscription's endpoint_auto_confirms flag, which tells Terraform whether the endpoint is capable of auto-confirming its subscription (e.g. PagerDuty) during apply. No effect on an already-confirmed live subscription.

params.name: subscription_arn
params.label: SNS subscription ARN
params.help: The subscription (topic + endpoint pair) to modify.

params.name: endpoint_auto_confirms
params.label: Endpoint auto-confirms
params.help: true if the endpoint auto-confirms its subscription (e.g. PagerDuty); default is false.

operations.title: Toggle raw message delivery
operations.summary: Turn raw message delivery on or off for this subscriber. Changes the message format, so the subscriber may need to adjust its parsing.
operations.description: Sets this subscription's raw_message_delivery flag: when true, the original message is passed directly to the endpoint instead of being wrapped in JSON. Changing the payload shape may require the subscriber to adjust its message parsing.

params.name: subscription_arn
params.label: SNS subscription ARN
params.help: The subscription (topic + endpoint pair) to modify.

params.name: raw_message_delivery
params.label: Raw message delivery
params.help: true passes the original message directly; false wraps it in JSON (default).

operations.title: Set Firehose subscription publish role
operations.summary: Set the IAM role SNS uses to publish this subscriber's messages into a Firehose delivery stream. A wrong role silently breaks delivery.
operations.description: Sets this subscription's subscription_role_arn -- the IAM role SNS assumes to publish the subscription's messages into a Kinesis Data Firehose delivery stream (used only for firehose-protocol subscriptions). A wrong role silently breaks delivery to this one subscriber.

params.name: subscription_arn
params.label: SNS subscription ARN
params.help: The subscription (topic + endpoint pair) to modify.

params.name: subscription_role_arn
params.label: Subscription role ARN
params.help: ARN of an IAM role SNS assumes to publish to the Kinesis Data Firehose delivery stream.

operations.title: Create a notification topic
operations.summary: Request a new notification topic; an engineer finalizes and reviews the Terraform before it is applied.
operations.description: Create a topic that alarms and jobs can notify. The first subscription rides the existing add-a-subscription action afterwards. Submitting routes it to an engineer with a draft Terraform block to review and finish.

params.name: topic_name
params.label: Topic name
params.help: Letters, numbers, dashes and underscores, like app-oncall-alerts.

params.name: display_name
params.label: Display name
params.help: The name shown in SMS and email notifications.

params.name: kms_key
params.label: Encryption key
params.help: Encrypt queued messages. Leave blank for no encryption key.

params.name: resource_name
params.label: Topic name tag
params.help: Shown as the name everywhere — consoles, tickets, this portal.

params.name: description_tag
params.label: What this topic notifies
params.help: One line an operator can act on at 3 AM.

params.name: pic
params.label: Person in charge
params.help: Who to call about this topic.

decisions: Delivery policy or dead-letter queue if this topic feeds alarms
